---
title: Summer 2019 Trip
author: ''
date: '2021-05-09'
slug: Summer 2019 Trip
categories: []
tags: []
description: ''
---
In my Comp Bio classs, we learned R and Python. The following is an example of the two ssspeaking.
```{R}
library(reticulate)
location = "Europe"
```

```{python}
location = "Belgium, the Netherlands, and France"
print(f"In summer 2019, I traveled to {r.location}. I've included photos from {location} that were only part of the trip.")
```
![](/post/2021-05-08-my-post_files/IMG_20190523_195031.jpg)
![](/post/2021-05-08-my-post_files/IMG_20190525_170552.jpg)
![](/post/2021-05-08-my-post_files/IMG_20190526_164709.jpg)
![](/post/2021-05-08-my-post_files/IMG_20190526_170804_1.jpg)
![](/post/2021-05-08-my-post_files/IMG_20190529_113644.jpg)
